summary: The actual screenshot shows a gameplay map with a Player Dashboard window that includes resources, army purchase, and hero assignment sections, overlaid on a starfield background. It closely matches the wireframe in overall layout and style but has several mismatches in content, labels, and elements, indicating partial conformance to the screen description and requirements. The wireframe is partially suitable but lacks detail for full validation.

correctElements.evidence: Both images feature a dark starfield/game-map background with celestial bodies and connections.
A dockable window titled 'Player Dashboard' is present on the left side in both, with thin green borders and semi-transparent black panels.
Resources (Population, Metal, Fuel) are displayed in the dashboard with values, matching the wireframe's placement and style.
A Map Key panel is present on the right side in both images.
Top bar with turn, phase, and active player info is present in both, using terminal-style labels.

incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: The phase name differs, which may indicate a mismatch in game state or labeling convention not captured in the wireframe.

incorrectElements.expected: Systems labeled as Sirius, Arcturus, Canopus
incorrectElements.actual: Systems labeled as Sirius and Canopus, no Arcturus
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe includes an extra or mislabeled system (Arcturus instead of expected), leading to inconsistency in map representation.
Actual includes dynamic increments not present in wireframe, affecting visual and functional validation.

incorrectElements.actual: Detailed sections: Territories, Armies, Army Purchase with buy buttons, Hero Assignment with buttons
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe uses a placeholder instead of actual scrollable body with resources, purchase, and hero controls, limiting validation of nesting and controls.

incorrectElements.expected: BACK and NEXT / APPLY buttons at bottom
incorrectElements.actual: No such buttons; instead, debug text and top=107
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Missing controls in actual that are present in wireframe, or vice versa, indicating incomplete implementation or wireframe inaccuracy.

incorrectElements.actual: Debug text like 'Panels F1 Dbg:On F2 Cmd:Off' present
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual screenshot includes debug elements not in wireframe, potentially due to development mode, affecting clean comparison at 1536x832.
Minor visual difference in line style, but as a residual risk, it highlights potential DPI/scaling or rendering variations not validated by static wireframe.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe provides a basic layout and style baseline matching the global requirements and screen description, but uses placeholders instead of detailed content, has inaccuracies in map labels and phase, and lacks representation of scrollable behavior or dynamic elements, making it insufficient for fully validating functional and technical requirements like FR-UI-SCREEN-PLAYER-DASHBOARD-WINDOW and TR-UI-AUDIT-HWND-001.
missingRequirements: Dynamic elements like resource increments and button interactions
Scrollable body with specific nesting of controls
Validation of z-order and DPI/scaling in actual HWND capture
recommendedWireframeChanges: Replace placeholders with detailed representations of resources, purchase controls, and hero controls
Correct map system labels to match expected gameplay (e.g., remove Arcturus if not intended)
Include dynamic state examples (e.g., increments) and remove extraneous buttons like BACK/NEXT if not part of the screen
Add annotations for scrollable areas and expected behaviors
